response.justification: Strong fullstack profile with 15+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Direct hits on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and current AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and clear customer-facing delivery track record. Missing explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and PostgreSQL experience, but the breadth of languages and frameworks suggests fast ramp-up. Worth an interview to validate framework-specific depth.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack across TypeScript/Node.js/React with recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work
Direct experience with AWS (CDK), MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes, and microservices at scale
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, code katas, public talks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright experience listed in the resume
No Kotlin and no PostgreSQL mentioned (has MongoDB/MySQL/SQL and Java instead)
Heavy non-mainstream DLang footprint may signal preference for niche stacks over the primary TS/Nest.js path
